'''鈭歯-ng-k''' ('''nangaka''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chamois|chamois]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-ng-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chamois|chamois]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯-ng-k
|-
! Lemma
| nangaka
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nangakithi|nangakithi]] || [[word:nangakiji|nangakiji]] || [[word:nangakishi|nangakishi]] || [[word:nangaki|nangaki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nangakuthuth|nangakuthuth]] || [[word:nangakujuj|nangakujuj]] || [[word:nangakushush|nangakushush]] || [[word:nangak|nangak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nangakuthu|nangakuthu]] || [[word:nangakuju|nangakuju]] || [[word:nangakushu|nangakushu]] || [[word:nangaku|nangaku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nangakufuth|nangakufuth]] || [[word:nangakufuj|nangakufuj]] || [[word:nangakufush|nangakufush]] || [[word:nangakuf|nangakuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nangakethe|nangakethe]] || [[word:nangakeje|nangakeje]] || [[word:nangakeshe|nangakeshe]] || [[word:nangake|nangake]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nangakothoth|nangakothoth]] || [[word:nangakojoj|nangakojoj]] || [[word:nangakoshosh|nangakoshosh]] || [[word:nangak|nangak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nangakotho|nangakotho]] || [[word:nangakojo|nangakojo]] || [[word:nangakosho|nangakosho]] || [[word:nangako|nangako]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nangakofoth|nangakofoth]] || [[word:nangakofoj|nangakofoj]] || [[word:nangakofosh|nangakofosh]] || [[word:nangakof|nangakof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nangak忙th忙|nangak忙th忙]] || [[word:nangak忙j忙|nangak忙j忙]] || [[word:nangak忙sh忙|nangak忙sh忙]] || [[word:nangak忙|nangak忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nangakathath|nangakathath]] || [[word:nangakajaj|nangakajaj]] || [[word:nangakashash|nangakashash]] || [[word:nangak|nangak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nangakatha|nangakatha]] || [[word:nangakaja|nangakaja]] || [[word:nangakasha|nangakasha]] || [[word:nangaka|nangaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nangakafath|nangakafath]] || [[word:nangakafaj|nangakafaj]] || [[word:nangakafash|nangakafash]] || [[word:nangakaf|nangakaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:nangakasha|nangakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gonangakasha|gonangakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokinangakasha|gokinangakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:nangakn眉sha|nangakn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gonangaknkn眉sha|gonangaknkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokinangakn眉sha|gokinangakn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nangaksh毛sha|nangaksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonangaknksh毛sha|gonangaknksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinangaksh毛sha|gokinangaksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nangakrosha|nangakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonangaknkrosha|gonangaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinangakrosha|gokinangakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nangakmusha|nangakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gonangaknkmusha|gonangaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinangakmusha|gokinangakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:nangaksherasha|nangaksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gonangaknksherasha|gonangaknksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokinangaksherasha|gokinangaksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:nangakngasha|nangakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gonangaknkngasha|gonangaknkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokinangakngasha|gokinangakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nangakyasha|nangakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gonangaknkyasha|gonangaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokinangakyasha|gokinangakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:nangakyamasha|nangakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gonangaknkyamasha|gonangaknkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokinangakyamasha|gokinangakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:nangakn眉sh毛sha|nangakn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonangaknkn眉sh毛sha|gonangaknkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinangakn眉sh毛sha|gokinangakn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nangakn眉rosha|nangakn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonangaknkn眉rosha|gonangaknkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinangakn眉rosha|gokinangakn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nangakn眉musha|nangakn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonangaknkn眉musha|gonangaknkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinangakn眉musha|gokinangakn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:nangaksh毛n眉sha|nangaksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonangaknksh毛n眉sha|gonangaknksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinangaksh毛n眉sha|gokinangaksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nangaksh毛rosha|nangaksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonangaknksh毛rosha|gonangaknksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinangaksh毛rosha|gokinangaksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nangaksh毛musha|nangaksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonangaknksh毛musha|gonangaknksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinangaksh毛musha|gokinangaksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:nangakron眉sha|nangakron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonangaknkron眉sha|gonangaknkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinangakron眉sha|gokinangakron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:nangakrosh毛sha|nangakrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonangaknkrosh毛sha|gonangaknkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinangakrosh毛sha|gokinangakrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nangakromusha|nangakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonangaknkromusha|gonangaknkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinangakromusha|gokinangakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:nangakmun眉sha|nangakmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonangaknkmun眉sha|gonangaknkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinangakmun眉sha|gokinangakmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:nangakmush毛sha|nangakmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonangaknkmush毛sha|gonangaknkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinangakmush毛sha|gokinangakmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nangakmurosha|nangakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonangaknkmurosha|gonangaknkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinangakmurosha|gokinangakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:nangak|nangak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n忙ng忙k|n忙ng忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:honangak|honangak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hon忙ng忙k|hon忙ng忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohonangak|hohonangak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohon忙ng忙k|hohon忙ng忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉nangak|n眉nangak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉n忙ng忙k|n眉n忙ng忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉nangak|n眉n眉nangak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉n忙ng忙k|n眉n眉n忙ng忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂nangak|n茂nangak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂n忙ng忙k|n茂n忙ng忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂nangak|n茂n茂nangak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂n忙ng忙k|n茂n茂n忙ng忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lunangak|lunangak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lun忙ng忙k|lun忙ng忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulunangak|lulunangak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulun忙ng忙k|lulun忙ng忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:linangak|linangak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lin忙ng忙k|lin忙ng忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilinangak|lilinangak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilin忙ng忙k|lilin忙ng忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:konangak|konangak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kon忙ng忙k|kon忙ng忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokonangak|kokonangak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokon忙ng忙k|kokon忙ng忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kenangak|kenangak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ken忙ng忙k|ken忙ng忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekenangak|kekenangak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keken忙ng忙k|keken忙ng忙k]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
